name: create-rect
description: User clicks toolbar → rectangle appears on canvas → CRDT op generated → synced to server → other clients see it

frontend.note: TS project with typed WASM boundary, layers panel, properties panel

engine.note: Node creation, tree insertion, hit test all working

server.note: Axum server with REST+WebSocket scaffolded, compiles

crdt.note: CRDT ops exist but not yet wired into WASM add_rectangle. Next step: route mutations through CRDT.
